schedule_metadata.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Restaurants and Retail Uses Within the "A" Area, no restaurant or retail use shall occupy more than ten percent (10%) of the gross floor area of a building except that a restaurant in association with a hotel or motel may occupy a maximum of twenty percent (20%) of the gross floor area of a building

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Height Notwithstanding the Maximum Height of Building Requirements in the Subdivision and Building Requirements section, within the "A" area the maximum height for a hotel, motel or office may be increased to 120 ft. where the separation distance of at least the height of the building is maintained from any residentially zoned property line. (NWCC-Sep 28/06;E-Oct 14/06)

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Architectural Requirements

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: A combination of arcades, display windows, entry areas, awnings or other such features shall be incorporated into all building facades along not less than 60% of their horizontal length facing a public street.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: No interrupted length of any facade facing a public street shall exceed 30.5 horizontal metres (100 feet). Wall plane projections or recesses shall be incorporated into all facades greater than 30.5 horizontal metres (100 feet) in length, measured horizontally, having a depth of at least 3 of the length of the facade and extending at least 20% of the length of the f acade. This clause shall not apply to office buildings that are over three storeys or 35' in height. (NWCC-Sep28/06;E-Oct14/06)

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: One clearly defined, visible entrance way shall be provided on the facade oriented to the public street shall be provided. The entrance way and front facade shall include no less than three of the following elements: Reveals Projecting Ribs Offsets Building Wall i canopies or porticos ii overhangs iii recesses/projections iv arcades v raised corniced parapets over the door vi peaked roof forms vii display windows viii architectural details such as tile work, and moldings which are integrated into the building ix integral planters or wing walls that incorporate landscaped areas and sitting places; and x or any other similar architectural treatment deemed to be an acceptable equivalent;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Rooftop equipment, including, but not limited to, satellite and other telecommunication equipment, air handling units, elevator equipment, cooling towers and exhaust fans shall to be screened (visually). The screening shall include but not limited to para pets and enclosures. Building screens shall be part of the architectural design with similar detailing and materials and not appear as add-ons.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Landscaping

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: A minimum of 25% of the property shall be landscaped. Landscaping shall include the retention of natural vegetation.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: At least 50% of the area between the street(s) and buildings shall be landscaped. Trimming and selective cutting of natural vegetation is permitted.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: A 15 foot landscape strip shall be installed along all street property lines, exclusive of driveways, walks and railroads rights -of-way. When the 15 foot landscape strip occurs between a parking area or vehicle manoeuvring area, loading area and the stre et, a landscape shrub screen of at least 50% opaqueness and a minimum of four feet in height within one year after installation is required. Mature trees at a maximum spacing of twenty feet may be substituted for or combined with a scrub screen. The l andscaping may be calculated as part of the 25% landscaping requirement in (a) above.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: All other landscaped areas shall be grassed, or alternatively, natural ground covers such as water features, stone (washed or flat), mulch, perennials, annuals, may be utilized. Within the landscaped area, trees, walls made of natural materials, planters, and shrubs shall be utilized and shall be planted at a rate of one (1) tree (minium of 45mm caliber) and three (3) shrubs per 4.6 metres (15 feet) of lot frontage. Tree Species from Appendix A shall be utilized. Planting of one

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: tree and three (3) shrubs per 4.6 metres (15 feet) feet of lot frontage shall reflect a natural setting thereby grouping of trees and shrubs is encouraged.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Existing trees and shrubs may be incorporated into the 6.1 metres (15 foot) landscaped strip, and where possible may be calculated as part of the one (1) tree and three (3) shrubs per 4.6 metres (15 feet) feet requirement specified under clause d).

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Accessory Uses/Storage

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: All permitted uses and accessory activities, including the storage of equipment or supplies used in any production or assembly shall be confined within an enclosed

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Accessory activities involving toxic or flammable products which cannot be located within an enclosed building shall be screened from view from all adjacent properties and public streets.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: External fuel storage tanks utilized as part of the heating equipment of an establishment or bulk storage of any materials used in any production or assembly shall be screened from view from all adjacent properties and public streets.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: All refuse shall be collected and stored in containers which shall be screened from view from all adjacent properties and public streets.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Utility and public service facilities and uses need to service the immediate vicinity shall be screened from view from all adjacent properties and public streets.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Driveway Access No use located within the "B" Area shall be permitted to have driveway access to the Hammonds Plains Road as illustrated on Schedule I. (NWCC -Feb 28/08;E-Mar 15/08)

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Parking No parking spaces may be located within required yards, except that an area equivalent to not more than 50% of the total area of all required parking spaces may be located within a required yard for use as parking space for visitors, selected personnel and minor deliveries.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Loading Notwithstanding the general loading space regulations in Part 5, Section 37, (General Provisions), the following shall apply:

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: All loading must be on site and no on-street loading is permitted.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Truck loading facilities shall be at the rear or side of the building and shall be screened from view from any adjacent residential property.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Loading space areas, including driveways leading to such area, shall be paved with a dust free all-weather surface, be well drained and be of a strength adequate for the truck traffic expected.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Signage Notwithstanding the general signage regulations in Part 5, Section 38, (General Provisions), the following shall apply:

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: No more than two signs per business shall be permitted.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Signs shall be restricted to advertising only the person, firm, company, or corporation operating the use conducted on the site or products sold therein.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Signs shall have an area not to exceed one (1) square feet of surface for each one

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: foot of lineal frontage of building. However, no sign shall exceed one hundred

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: square feet per face.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: No more than one free -standing or ground mounted sign may be permitted per lot.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Ground signs shall not exceed eight (16) feet above grade in vertical height and shall be setback a minimal of 10 feet from any street line.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Businesses located in multiple tenant buildings may have a maximum of two (2) signs with a maximum of one (1) sign for each facade. Each sign shall not exceed an area equal to ten (10) percent of the business face upon which it is located. However, no sign shall exceed thirty-five (35) square feet in area.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Directory listing signs: Detailed signs for multi -tenant buildings may list building tenants. The portion of the sign area devoted to such a listing shall be limited to 60% of the total permitted sign area, and the tenant listing shall be uniform in siz e, type, and lettering. It is understood, however, than tenant "logos" are permitted to be depicted on such signs, the size of the logo to be appropriate to the size of the sign lettering. Each sign shall not exceed twenty

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: feet in height.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: One temporary announcement/construction sign per lot is permitted during active construction of building. Announcement/construction signage shall not exceed

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

sections.title_label_raw: square feet in area per face.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: square feet in area per face.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: No signs shall be located on the roof of a building and billboards shall be prohibited. Business Park Identification and Directory Signs

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Identification Sign: One identification sign with the park logo at each entrance or along each street abutting the boundaries of the tract shall be permitted. The maximum area of each sign face shall be one hundred and fifty (150) square feet.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Directory Signs: Signs identifying companies in the research and development park shall be permitted within 300 feet from the maximum of two (2) major arterial streets. The sign(s) shall have a maximum height of twelve (12) feet and shall not exceed one hundred and fifty (150) square feet per face.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: A map locator directory sign identifying companies in a research and development park shall be permitted. A maximum of two (2) such signs shall be permitted within 300 feet from the maximum of two (2) major arterial streets. The sign (s) shall have a maximum height of twelve (12) feet and shall not exceed one hundred and fifty (150) square feet per face.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Spaces on such directory signs allocated for company identification shall be of equal area, and letters and typeface must be of equal value and uniform throughout the sign.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: There shall be a maximum of two (2) directory signs.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Additional Requirements for Gas Bars (RC-May 20/14;E-Jun 14/14)

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: All buildings and pump islands shall be designed so that all sides are a consistent architectural style.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Transparent windows and doors for retail buildings shall be provided between the store, the pump islands and surrounding streets along not less than 50% of their horizontal length.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Where driveways or stacking lanes cross walkways, pavement markings shall be provided to identify the walkway crossing.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Where stacking lanes are adjacent a residential use, a solid board wood or equivalent opaque type fence no less than five feet and no greater than six feet in height shall be provided.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Access points for stacking lanes shall be located such that queued vehicles do not block traffic along public streets or the movement of other vehicles on site.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Where two drive-through uses facilities exist on the same site, separate stacking lanes shall be provided for each use.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Stacking lanes shall be separated from parking areas and driveways by a combination of landscaped islands, decorative pavement, pervious islands and painted lines.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: On-site circulation shall be designed to facilitate unobstructed forward movement by tanker trucks and the safe unloading of fuels.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Walkways shall be distinguished from driving surfaces by a raised curb and by paving material.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Bicycle parking shall be located in a manner that does not impede pedestrian movement.

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Site Plan Approval Site plan approval shall be required for any new development, excluding internal renovation or change in occupancy with no external renovations, within the Bedford West Business Campus (BWBC) Zone and no site plan approval shall be granted unless the following criterion are satisfied:

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: no outdoor storage or outdoor display and sales shall be permitted within the "A" Area and any outdoor waste containers shall be screened in both Areas;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: open spaces are integrated into the layout and where feasible, larger trees are retained;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: landscaping is introduced to all areas disturbed during construction;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: preference is given to limiting parking spaces between a building and the front lot line and no loading bays shall be located on the building facade facing a public street;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: natural vegetation, landscaping or screening is employed around parking areas and measures are taken to allow for safe and convenient pedestrian access to public entrances of buildings;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: bicycle storage facilities are provided near the main entrances to the building or in designated public spaces;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: walkways shall extend from the entrances of buildings to a public sidewalk in front of the building and to any public trail system abutting the property and, unless otherwise not possible, shall not cross any driveways or parking areas;

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: buildings, structures and parking lots are located on a lot so as to minimize the alteration of natural grades and to minimize the area of impervious surfaces; and

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: a storm water management plan has been prepared by a Professional Engineer with any measures required to prevent the contamination of watercourses and, where possible, allows surface water flows to be directed to permeable surfaces. (RC-Jun 20/06;E-Jul 29/06)

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)
Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Pedway Notwithstanding the required minimum side yard setbacks of the BWBC zone, a pedway connecting existing buildings at 123 Gary Martin Drive (PID 41257593) and

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

sections.title_label_raw: Gary Martin Drive (PID 41466723) may be permitted. For the purposes of

citations.title_label_raw: Service Stations as Permitted Use on ILI (Light Industrial)

provisions.text: Gary Martin Drive (PID 41466723) may be permitted. For the purposes of constructing a pedway, the minimum side yard setback is reduced to 0 feet" (NWCC- Apr 25/22;E-May 12/22)
